enum_values.name: Material
enum_values.summary: Replace the material page with this page; only works for the current render plug - in.

enum_values.name: Light
enum_values.summary: Replace the light page with this page; only works for the current render plug-in.

enum_values.name: Dimension
enum_values.summary: If page is provided by Rhino and only dimensions are selected, activate this page.

enum_values.name: Leader
enum_values.summary: If page is provided by Rhino and leaders are selected, activate this page.

enum_values.name: Text
enum_values.summary: If page is provided by Rhino and only text objects are selected, activate this page.

enum_values.name: Hatch
enum_values.summary: If page is provided by Rhino and only hatch objects are selected, activate this page.

enum_values.name: Dot
enum_values.summary: If page is provided by Rhino and only dot objects are selected, activate this page.

enum_values.name: TextureMapping
enum_values.summary: Replace the texture mapping page with this page; only works for the current render plug-in.

enum_values.name: Detail
enum_values.summary: If page is provided by Rhino and only detail objects are selected, activate this page.

enum_values.name: ClippingPlane
enum_values.summary: If page is provided by Rhino and only clipping plane objects are selected, activate this page.

enum_values.name: NamedView
enum_values.summary: If page is provided by Rhino and only named view widget objects are selected, activate this page.

enum_values.name: View
enum_values.summary: Page is a view properties page and uses view properties methods. Does not use object properties methods.
